things.name: Place de la Comedie
things.description: Montpellier's grand egg-shaped central square with the Three Graces fountain

things.name: Musee Fabre
things.description: One of France's finest provincial art museums with European masters and French paintings

things.name: Promenade du Peyrou
things.description: Royal esplanade with a triumphal arch, aqueduct and the best views in the city

things.name: Jardin des Plantes
things.description: France's oldest botanical garden founded in 1593 for the medical faculty

things.name: Antigone District
things.description: Ricardo Bofill's vast postmodern neoclassical housing district - extraordinary architecture

things.name: Cathedral Saint-Pierre
things.description: Gothic cathedral with 15th-century porch canopy - the only medieval monument in Montpellier

things.name: Palavas-les-Flots Beach
things.description: Lively seaside resort 12km from the city centre with Mediterranean beaches

things.name: Quartier Ecusson
things.description: Montpellier's medieval old town with winding lanes and Baroque mansions

things.name: MO.CO. Contemporary Art Centre
things.description: Cutting-edge contemporary art exhibitions in the Hotel de Montcalm

things.name: Nimes Day Trip
things.description: The world's best preserved Roman city - the Maison Carree, Arena and the Pont du Gard
